evolution.Task: Find and annotate genome variants shared across two evolved E. coli lines relative to the ancestor.
evolution.Prompt:
Identify and annotate genome variants in two evolved lines relative to an ancestor lines of E. coli; report only variants shared by both evolved lines of moderate or higher predicted severity. The output should be a CSV file with the following columns: 'chrom','pos','ref','alt','gene','impact','effect',status'.<example>CHROM,POS,REF,ALT,GENE,IMPACT,EFFECT,STATUS
NODE_4_length_102007_cov_6.351643,6352,T,C,ICCIAKIK_00327,MODERATE,missense_variant,shared</example> Run the analysis inside the Galaxy environment.
